generated_exposure.exposure_text: New intelligence reports show that domestic extremist groups are increasingly coordinating with foreign actors. Recent operations in [REDACTED CITY] showed how crucial timely intelligence sharing can be. Let's make sure our heroes in law enforcement and intelligence have what they need to keep us safe.
